---
title: "Tyler Celotta"
subtitle: "Personal Portfolio"
image: profile.gif
image-alt: "Photo of Tyler"
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/TyGuy-5
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tyler-celotta/
---

A little bit about me and my life. 

## Education

- Enrolled in 3/2 Dual Degree Program: BA Physics (Reed) + BS Mechanical Engineering (Columbia University)

- Coursework: Calculus (I,II,III), Linear Algebra, Data Science, Physics, Chemistry, Logic, Humanities, Ethics, Economics

- Earned credits from the University of Minnesota (Physics, English, Python)

- Earned credits from the University of St.Thomas (Statistics)

## Experience
- Intern, Mechanical Engineering, Twin Cities Makers -- Minneapolis, MN | Jun 2025 -- Aug 2025

- Lifeguard, City of Lino Lakes & Community Education ISD12 -- Lion Lakes, MN | Jul 2022 -- Aug 2023

- Barista, Caribou Coffee -- Moundsview, MN | Jun 2024 -- Sept 2025

- Contracted Trip Leader -- Portland, OR | Aug 2025 -- Sep 2025 

- Van Driver, Reed College -- Portland, OR | Aug 2024 -- Present

- Umpire, Centennial Little League -- Lion Lakes, MN | Feb 2022 -- Jul 2025

- Portrait Photographer, Celotta Photos | April 2023 -- Present
